
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 14. A.20 Sports science**

| Intervention | Effect | Source |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Caffeine on endurance performance | d =0.33 (I²=0%) | Meta-analyses |
| Beta-alanine (all uses) | ES=0.18 | Meta-analyses |
| Beta-alanine (0.5–10 min tasks) | ES=0.50 | Meta-analyses |
| Strength training on injury prevention | RR≈0.32 (68% reduction) | Lauersen et al. [@lauersen2014] |
| Stretching alone on injury prevention | Null | Multiple meta-analyses |
| Cold-water immersion on soreness | SMD=−0.37 to −0.89 | Meta-analyses |
| Compression garments on recovery | g =0.40–0.49 | Meta-analyses |
:::
